title: Dangerous Dreams
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Dangerous_Dreams.jpg|thumb|250px]]
'''''Dangerous Dreams''''' was an album by the band [[Red Shift Limit/Legends|Red Shift Limit]]. It was banned by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].
